titleEn: Vacuum packaging gains ground in fresh produce supply chains
titleZh: 真空包装在生鲜供应链中应用渐广，助力减损与保质期延长
summaryZh: 本文报道了真空包装技术在生鲜农产品供应链中的推广趋势。由于采后损失（水分流失、氧化、物理损伤）持续困扰行业，且供应链延长、零售商要求更长货架期，真空包装通过去除氧气、抑制微生物生长，有效延长了部分产品（如香草、蘑菇、干果、切菜、即食食品）的保质期。商用腔式真空封口机可提供一致真空度，支持更可预测的保质期，同时减少食品浪费、提升库存灵活性，尤其对出口商意义重大。设备制造商如Promarksvac和Introvac正持续改进系统以适应更广泛产品与更高产能需求。
featuredReason: 虽然真空包装技术本身并非智慧畜牧核心（IoT/AI/自动化），但其在生鲜供应链中减少损耗、延长保质期的实践，对畜牧行业（尤其是肉类、乳制品、预制菜等冷链产品）的包装与保鲜策略有直接借鉴意义，值得关注其自动化与可持续性趋势。
contentFull: Vacuum packaging gains ground in fresh produce supply chains Post-harvest losses continue to pressure the fresh produce industry, with moisture loss, oxidation, and physical damage during storage and transport accounting for a significant share of wasted product. As supply chains lengthen and retailers demand longer shelf life with less spoilage, packaging technology is playing an increasingly central role in how growers, processors, and distributors manage quality from farm to shelf. Temperature fluctuations, exposure to oxygen, and inconsistent handling between harvest and retail remain among the most common causes of quality degradation in fresh produce. For exporters in particular, extended transit times raise the stakes, since even minor packaging shortcomings can result in product arriving at its destination in unsellable condition. This has pushed many operations to reassess how they package goods at the point of processing, rather than relying solely on cold chain logistics. © Promaksvac Corp Vacuum packaging is one tool addressing these issues. By removing air from a package before sealing, vacuum sealing slows oxidation and limits the conditions that support microbial growth, which can extend usable shelf life for suitable products. The technology is not applicable to all fresh produce, but it has found practical use across categories including herbs, mushrooms, dried fruits, processed and cut vegetables, and prepared or ready-to-eat foods, where air exposure is a primary driver of quality loss. Commercial chamber vacuum sealers, used widely in food processing and packaging facilities, allow operators to apply consistent vacuum levels across batches, which supports more predictable shelf-life outcomes compared with manual or less controlled sealing methods. Beyond shelf-life extension, vacuum packaging is increasingly viewed through a sustainability lens. Reducing spoilage during storage and transit lowers food waste, while more stable shelf life gives processors and distributors greater flexibility in inventory planning and order fulfillment. For exporters managing longer transit windows, this can translate into fewer rejected shipments and reduced losses across the supply chain. © Promaksvac Corp Equipment manufacturers serving this space include Promarksvac Corporation, which produces commercial chamber vacuum sealers and vacuum packaging equipment for food processing, packaging, and industrial applications. Introvac is another supplier in the sector, offering commercial vacuum packaging and sealing equipment aimed at businesses seeking dependable, repeatable packaging performance across production runs. As fresh produce supply chains continue to navigate rising logistics costs and sustainability expectations, packaging equipment manufacturers are likely to keep refining vacuum sealing systems to handle a broader range of products and throughput demands. For an industry where product quality can be lost in the space between harvest and shelf, continued advances in food packaging equipment are expected to remain a focus area for processors and exporters alike. translationZh: 真空包装在生鲜农产品供应链中逐渐普及。采后损失持续给生鲜农产品行业带来压力，其中水分流失、氧化以及储存和运输过程中的物理损伤占产品浪费的很大一部分。随着供应链延长，零售商要求更长的货架期和更少的损耗，包装技术在种植者、加工商和分销商如何管理从农场到货架的质量方面发挥着越来越核心的作用。温度波动、暴露于氧气以及从收获到零售之间的不一致处理仍然是生鲜农产品质量下降的最常见原因。对于出口商而言，延长的运输时间尤其提高了风险，因为即使是微小的包装缺陷也可能导致产品到达目的地时无法销售。这促使许多运营方重新评估他们在加工环节如何包装产品，而不仅仅依赖冷链物流。© Promaksvac Corp 真空包装是解决这些问题的一种工具。通过在密封前从包装中去除空气，真空密封减缓了氧化，并限制了支持微生物生长的条件，从而可以延长适用产品的可用货架期。该技术并非适用于所有生鲜农产品，但已在包括香草、蘑菇、干果、加工和切好的蔬菜以及预制或即食食品等品类中找到实际用途，在这些品类中，暴露于空气是质量损失的主要驱动因素。商用腔式真空封口机广泛应用于食品加工和包装设施，允许操作员在批次之间施加一致的真空度，与手动或控制较少的密封方法相比，这支持更可预测的货架期结果。除了延长货架期，真空包装越来越多地从可持续性的角度被看待。减少储存和运输过程中的损耗降低了食品浪费，而更稳定的货架期使加工商和分销商在库存规划和订单履行方面具有更大的灵活性。对于管理更长运输窗口的出口商来说，这可以转化为更少的拒收货物和整个供应链中更少的损失。© Promaksvac Corp 服务于这一领域的设备制造商包括Promarksvac Corporation，该公司生产用于食品加工、包装和工业应用的商用腔式真空封口机和真空包装设备。Introvac是该行业的另一家供应商，提供商用真空包装和封口设备，旨在满足寻求在生产运行中实现可靠、可重复包装性能的企业。随着生鲜农产品供应链继续应对不断上升的物流成本和可持续性期望，包装设备制造商可能会继续改进真空密封系统，以处理更广泛的产品和更高的吞吐量需求。对于一个产品质量可能在收获与货架之间的空间里丢失的行业来说，包装技术的进步正成为维持价值的关键。

As supply chains lengthen and retailers demand longer shelf life with less spoilage, packaging…
